title: Content Codings, Character Sets, Media Admission, and Digests
description: Compressed and decoded sizes are conflated, unknown encodings are guessed, binary responses reach HTML parsing, and one digest represents every stage. Learners cumulatively produce representation decoding and identity ledger through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Track wire, compressed, decoded, retained, parsed, and extracted sizes and stop before resource ceilings.
Validate content-coding order and classify unsupported, corrupt, partial, over-budget, and cancellation outcomes.
Use transport media type plus conservative sniff evidence to accept HTML or XML and reject binary and ambiguous bodies.
